title: rosa × andegavensis var. dollineriana
intro: Rosa × andegavensis var. dollineriana, also known as Dolliner's rose, is a variety of the Andegavensis hybrid rose, a cross between Rosa gallica and Rosa rubiginosa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which are derived from its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Rosa × andegavensis var. dollineriana include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various skin conditions and promote overall health.
